main_hypothesis.justification: Captura 2 de 3 hipótesis (antiespumante+polímero) en MH; covers 3rd in alts.

key_signals.justification: Conecta TS 58 vs 72 + hidrocarburos + TOC + depósito gelatinoso descarta Fe.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (bio, hidrocarburos, polímero, coloidal inorgánico) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir flux + monitoreo + coordinar refinería + planta vecina + activar bypass — gold-aligned.

requested_data.justification: Pide autopsia/hisopado FTIR — match accepted (identify-first approach).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: FTIR polímero predominante o Fe/Al → switch.
